name: Kitchen
description: A functional cooking room. Contains a cook line (furnace + smoker/blast-furnace + crafting table) against an exterior wall, a sink (cauldron with water) under a window, storage barrels along an interior wall, and at least two light sources. Walls of @primary, floor of @floor, lintel beams instead of a solid ceiling so a roof skill can stack on top.

required_furniture.rule: prep counter, next to the furnace pair
against an exterior wall; chimney passes overhead in stacked builds
next to the furnace; preferred on medium+; modern style omits and uses two smokers
alternative cook station on medieval/fantasy when AABB depth allows
sink, placed under a window; water source occupies its interior
storage along an interior wall; scale with AABB area
at least 2 light sources; on modern style use redstone_lamp
alternative light fixture; preferred over torches when AABB ceiling is closed

placement_rules: Cook line (furnace + smoker + crafting_table) along one exterior wall.
Sink (cauldron) against a wall under a window — water source 1 block tall.
Storage barrels along an interior wall opposite the cook line.
Two windows on opposite or adjacent walls to satisfy 'Light on Two Sides'.
Lintel beams (Line ops between wall tops) instead of a full ceiling so a roof skill can stack.
Lights placed near work surfaces (over cook line and over prep counter).
lighting_ventilation: Two or more torches/lanterns near work surfaces; at least two windows for cross-ventilation; cook line vents through the roof when a chimney skill is stacked on top.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone floor, oak walls, exposed beams. Furnace + cauldron + barrels. Torches on walls.

modern.notes: Quartz walls, andesite floor, big stained-glass windows. Two smokers instead of a furnace. Redstone-lamp lighting.

fantasy.notes: Dark-oak walls, mossy-cobblestone floor, purple-glass windows. Blast_furnace + cauldron + brewing-stand. Sea_lantern lighting.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.kitchen.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
